args.query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(Id),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'),'#','') LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(Id),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM('003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'),'#','') LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(AccountId),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'),'#','') AND EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, Status, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(AccountId),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'),'#','') AND EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';

args.query: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice FROM OrderItem WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(OrderId),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM('801Wt00000PHRYWIA5'),'#','') ;

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, OrderId, Product2Id, Quantity, UnitPrice FROM OrderItem WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(OrderId),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM('801Wt00000PHRYWIA5'),'#','') ;

args.query: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(Id),'#','') IN (REPLACE(TRIM('01tWt000006hV8LIAU'),'#',''), REPLACE(TRIM('01tWt000006hTUkIAM'),'#',''));

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, Name FROM Product2 WHERE REPLACE(TRIM(Id),'#','') IN (REPLACE(TRIM('01tWt000006hV8LIAU'),'#',''), REPLACE(TRIM('01tWt000006hTUkIAM'),'#',''));
